title: Youth Violence Prevention - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Youth Violence Prevention 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF IMPACT NW IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER COMMUNITIES FOR SAFE KIDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An educational program that draws from the latest research on violence prevention. Providers go into local classrooms to teach children and youth how to get help if they are being abused or are living with violence. Offers programs to teach children that they have the right to be safe, to listen to their feelings, and to tell and keep telling safe adults when they need help. Also teaches adults (parents, caregivers, and teachers) how to listen to children, how to identify abuse indicators, and how to respond appropriately. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Grades K-5 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 721-6792 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK MILPA GUN VIOLENCE PREVENTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers case management and mentorship for youth at risk of community violence. Family resources available to promote positive choices and prevent violence. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 13-21 Latine and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 830-1554 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support services, including counseling, support groups, violence and anger prevention training, life skills groups, parenting classes, new parenting groups, crime victims support, community information and referral and temporary housing. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Ages 6-21 and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW COMMUNITIES FOR SAFE KIDS LATINO NETWORK MILPA GUN VIOLENCE PREVENTION PROGRAM NEXT DOOR YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES
